summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: SchemeOfWork component, Real OpenAI TTS for Dictation, and Enhanced CreateNotes rich text editor. All features working correctly. Fixed one critical bug (missing FolderOpen import in MyFiles.js).
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: Auth/me with valid token returns user data
Backend: Auth/me without token returns 401
Backend: TTS endpoint (POST /api/dictation/generate) returns audio/mpeg for en-GB (62KB)
Backend: TTS endpoint returns audio/mpeg for Swahili (63KB)
Backend: TTS endpoint returns audio/mpeg for Arabic (82KB)
Backend: TTS endpoint returns audio/mpeg for Turkish (56KB)
Backend: TTS endpoint returns audio/mpeg for French (69KB)
Backend: TTS rejects empty text with 400
Backend: TTS enforces 200 word limit
Backend: TTS requires authentication
Backend: Notes POST creates note with HTML content
Backend: Notes GET returns user notes
Backend: Notes DELETE removes note
Backend: Dictations POST saves dictation record
Backend: Dictations GET returns user dictations
Frontend: SchemeOfWork component renders (no longer Coming Soon)
Frontend: SchemeOfWork has all 6 header inputs (school, teacher, subject, year, term, class)
Frontend: SchemeOfWork table has 12 columns
Frontend: SchemeOfWork pagination buttons (Previous/Next) exist
Frontend: SchemeOfWork Add Row button exists
Frontend: SchemeOfWork Save Template button exists
Frontend: SchemeOfWork Export as DOCX button exists
Frontend: SchemeOfWork textareas are editable
Frontend: CreateNotes has font family selector
Frontend: CreateNotes has font size selector
Frontend: CreateNotes has Bold, Italic, Underline, Strikethrough buttons
Frontend: CreateNotes has text color picker with dropdown
Frontend: CreateNotes has Undo/Redo buttons
Frontend: CreateNotes contentEditable editor is functional
Frontend: CreateNotes Save Note button exists
Frontend: Dictation has all 5 language buttons (en-GB, sw, ar, tr, fr)
Frontend: Dictation text input with 200 word limit
Frontend: Dictation Generate Audio button works
Frontend: Dictation audio player appears after generation
Frontend: Dictation Save and Download MP3 buttons appear
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/MyFiles.js - Added missing FolderOpen import from lucide-react
seed_data_creation: Test user and session already existed in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (SchemeOfWork, TTS Dictation, CreateNotes) are fully functional. TTS is now REAL (not mocked) using OpenAI via Emergent LLM key. PesaPal payments remain MOCKED. Test session token test_session_tts_001 is valid for 7 days.

bugs_fixed.issue: FolderOpen icon was used but not imported from lucide-react
bugs_fixed.fix: Added FolderOpen to the import statement
bugs_fixed.severity: CRITICAL - caused runtime error preventing MyHub from loading

real_integrations.POST /api/dictation/generate: Real OpenAI TTS via Emergent LLM key - returns actual MP3 audio
